# Deficiency Balance After Repo or Foreclosure [2026] - Deficiencybalance
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Owe a deficiency balance after repossession or foreclosure? Learn your options: negotiate, dispute, or discharge in bankruptcy. 2026 g...

## About
deficiencybalance.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- State Anti-Deficiency Laws - Where Lenders Cannot Pursue You - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/anti-deficiency-laws.html
- Auto Repossession Deficiency - What You Owe After Repo - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/auto-repo-deficiency.html
- Bankruptcy and Deficiency Balances - Complete Elimination - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/bankruptcy-and-deficiency.html
- Deficiency Balance Credit Impact - How It Affects Your Score - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/credit-impact-deficiency.html
- Deficiency Balance Laws by State - State-Specific Rules [2026] - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/deficiency-balance-laws-by-state.html
- Deficiency Judgment - From Lawsuit to Wage Garnishment - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/deficiency-judgment.html
- Foreclosure Deficiency Balance - Can They Come After You? - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/foreclosure-deficiency.html
- Deficiency Balance After Repo or Foreclosure [2026] - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/
- Negotiating a Deficiency Balance - Settlement Strategies - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/negotiating-deficiency.html
- Right to Cure Before Deficiency - Preventing the Balance - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/right-to-cure-deficiency.html
- Statute of Limitations on Deficiency Balances - How Long Creditors Have to Sue - Deficiencybalance: https://deficiencybalance.com/statute-of-limitations-deficiency.html
- Privacy Policy: https://deficiencybalance.com/privacy.html
